creator: fgutierrez@americatel.com.pe
text:
Americatel Peru

Americatel is an ISP in Lima, Peru that offers hosting services with FreeBSD servers. Mail hosting uses Postfix, Amavisd-new, Clamav, Spamassassin, dovecot and Squirrelmail. Web hosting uses Apache and PHP5. We also use Freebsd as our DNS servers and other internal and external services.
